title: hedyotis banksii
intro: Hedyotis banksii, also known as Banks' button or Round Leaved Hedyotis, is a type of flowering plant species in the Rubiaceae family, commonly found in Eastern Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, with reported medicinal properties including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hedyotis banksii are thought to include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as potential anti-oxidant and anti-cancer properties. Hedyotis banksii is often prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, and in some cases, is used in combination with other herbs in traditional remedies.
